title: Allow bigger than 5x5 tables for docs via the API
excerpt:
See How to use the API to create a table in a WorkDoc? - #4 by Matias.Monday 
I would like to be able to create doc tables that are bigger than 5 rows by 5 columns via the API.

posts.author: danielball (Daniel Ball)
posts.cookedHtml:
See How to use the API to create a table in a WorkDoc? - #4 by Matias.Monday

I would like to be able to create doc tables that are bigger than 5 rows by 5 columns via the API.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @danielball for the request!

posts.author: danielball (Daniel Ball)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s ok. What’s the ETA on this then ?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @danielball,

As of today there is no ETA, but we will update you here if that changes!
